description: libraryagent.googleapis.com appears to host Google's example Library Agent API, a sample service used in generated client libraries. The available public evidence shows a REST-style API endpoint on the googleapis.com domain, but not broader developer surfaces like GraphQL, MCP, or a domain-specific CLI.
summary: libraryagent.googleapis.com exposes one HTTP API surface: the Google Library Agent API at https://libraryagent.googleapis.com/, with OAuth 2.0 authentication indicated by generated client libraries but no public first-party API reference or machine-readable spec located from the domain search results.
